title: ‘Tis the Season
excerpt: Though I don't send out holiday cards, I quite enjoy receiving them. Usually we hang them up and I take a photo of them all displayed in our little apartment. This year I just didn't have it together. As they…
body:
Though I don't send out holiday cards, I quite enjoy receiving them. Usually we hang them up and I take a photo of them all displayed in our little apartment. This year I just didn't have it together. As they came streaming in, I thought I would snap a photo of groups of them to share. This plan only worked on 2 days. So here are just some of the cards we received.

Some of these will go into my December Daily (which I am WAY behind on) and others will get rubber-banded together with a post-it note on the top labelled 2012. Hope you all are enjoying your holidays!
